problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
